name: Uninsured subcontractor caused my injury in Boise—any recourse?

mainEntity.name: Uninsured subcontractor caused my injury in Boise—any recourse?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, sue them personally and check general contractor liability.** Idaho third-party claims hold individuals accountable.[2] Key factors: (1) Property owners often vicarious; (2) workers' comp still pays; (3) assets seizable; (4) 2-year limit.[2][3] File comp, investigate finances, attorney collects judgments. Alternatives ensure payment.
